name: vscode-bluespec
description: Bluespec Classic (.bs) and SystemVerilog (.bsv) language support via bs-lsp

bluespec.serverPath.description: Path to the bs-lsp binary. Defaults to 'bs-lsp' (must be on PATH).

bluespec.serverEnv.description: Extra environment variables to pass to bs-lsp (e.g. BLUESPECDIR).

bluespec.trace.server.description: Trace LSP communication between VS Code and bs-lsp.

bluespec.debugMode.description: Enable bs-lsp debug logging. All JSON-RPC traffic (requests, responses, notifications) will be written to bs-lsp-debug.log next to your bsc.toml (or the workspace root if none is found). The server restarts automatically when this setting changes.

bluespec.debugLogPath.description: Override path for the bs-lsp debug log (used when bluespec.debugMode is true). Leave empty to auto-detect: the log is written as bs-lsp-debug.log next to the bsc.toml in your workspace, or in the workspace root if no bsc.toml is found.
